name: Capterra: Product Search
description: Search Capterra by keyword and return a deduplicated list of product candidates with rating, review count, and the canonical /p/<id>/<slug>/reviews/ URL. Use to discover product URLs to feed into capterra/product-details-reviews.

help.summary: Discover Capterra products by keyword. Returns one row per unique product (deduplicated by /p/<id>/<slug>/reviews URL).
help.returns: Object: { query, count, results: [{ product_id, product_name, product_url, rating, review_count }] }. Feed product_url into capterra/product-details-reviews.
notes: Capterra is fronted by Cloudflare. Cold sessions may hit a 'Just a moment...' challenge — open the URL once in the same browser profile to clear it before re-running.
Dedup is by Capterra product id (the numeric segment in /p/<id>/<slug>/reviews/).
Rating + review count are parsed from anchor text matching '4.5 (1234)'.

browser_automation.description: Search Capterra by keyword and extract deduplicated product cards via JS.

sequences.name: capterra_search
sequences.description: Navigate -> wait for product anchors -> JS-dedupe by product id.

steps.name: Extract deduped product list
steps.script: const cleanArg = (v) => { const t = String(v == null ? '' : v).trim(); return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(t) ? '' : t; }; const query = cleanArg(arg0); const norm = (v) => String(v || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const anchors = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("a[href*='/p/'][href*='/reviews/']")); const byProduct = new Map(); for (const a of anchors) { const url = a.href.replace(/[?#].*$/, ''); const idMatch = url.match(/\/p\/(\d+)\/([^/]+)\/reviews/); if (!idMatch) continue; const productId = idMatch[1]; const slug = idMatch[2]; const text = norm(a.textContent); if (!byProduct.has(productId)) { byProduct.set(productId, { product_id: productId, slug, product_url: url, candidates: [] }); } byProduct.get(productId).candidates.push(text); } const results = Array.from(byProduct.values()).map((entry) => { const ratingText = entry.candidates.find((t) => /\d(\.\d+)?\s*\(\d/.test(t)) || ''; const ratingMatch = ratingText.match(/(\d(?:\.\d+)?)\s*\(/); const reviewMatch = ratingText.match(/\(([\d,]+)\)/); const named = entry.candidates.find((t) => t && !/^\d/.test(t) && !/View all/i.test(t) && t.length > 1); return { product_id: entry.product_id, product_name: named || entry.slug.replace(/-/g, ' '), product_url: entry.product_url, rating: ratingMatch ? ratingMatch[1] : 'N/A', review_count: reviewMatch ? reviewMatch[1].replace(/,/g, '') : 'N/A' }; }); return { query: query || null, count: results.length, results };
